patch.value: synthesizeExtensionManifest(blueprint, identity): generate a complete least-privilege ExtensionManifest from a blueprint

Pure generator in src/sdk/compose.ts. Merges author identity (name/version/entry/priority + optional engines/permissions/provenance/manifest_version/pm_min_version/pm_max_version/sandbox_profile/activation/legacy_capability_aliases) with capabilities=deriveExtensionCapabilities(blueprint), unioned with optional identity.additionalCapabilities (legacy-alias resolved, normalized, unknown dropped) for surfaces the imperative activate escape hatch registers. Sorted, de-duplicated. Pairs with defineExtensionManifest (which only TYPES a hand-written manifest).

Shipped synthesizeExtensionManifest(blueprint, identity) in src/sdk/compose.ts: merges author identity with capabilities=deriveExtensionCapabilities, unioned with optional additionalCapabilities (alias-resolved, unknown dropped), sorted+deduped. Verified end-to-end via built dist (round-trip: synthesized manifest activates with exactly its capabilities). 100% cov.
